raw_consumer_statement:
A charge of {$1200.00} was made to my Costco CitiCard on XX/XX/year> for a transaction with XXXX XXXX. 

I have never used this card for any charge whatsoever, including this charge. 
I submitted a complaint to CitiBank. They provide me with a phone number to contact XXXX XXXX. The number is no longer in service. I can not locate another means to contact XXXX ( either phone or e-mail ). 

CitiBank has determined that I have provided insufficient information to resolve my complaint, and the charge will remain open and accrue interest.. 

Since I did not make the alleged transaction and can not contact XXXX, I have no way to clear this charge from my account. 
I have requested a new card with a different account number from Citi.
